utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: David , can you help me ? ! I am trying to explain to Chandler how a plane stays in the air .

utterances.speaker: David
utterances.text: Oh , certainly . That is a combination of Bernoulli principle and Newton third law of motion .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , that is the same as " it has something to do with wind " .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Alright , I am gonna go pick up a few things for the trip .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , now ... tomorrow do you guys wanna share a cab to the airport or should Mike and I just meet you there .
